description_long: This house features a single-story structure with a prominent red hip roof and a white exterior. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, a set of steps leading to the main entrance, and a fenced perimeter with stone pillars. The rear and side walls are mostly solid, with minimal window openings visible, emphasizing privacy. A secondary flat-roofed section is attached to one side, likely serving as a utility or service area. The property is set on a rectangular plot with a paved entryway and a small yard area. The overall design is simple and functional, with Mediterranean influences in the roof and porch details.
description: A single-story house with a red hip roof, white exterior, covered front porch, and fenced entry, featuring Mediterranean architectural elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance steps, columns, and fenced entry with stone pillars.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid white wall, hip roof, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the hip roof, attached flat-roofed section, and the solid rear wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat-roofed utility area, side fencing, and the continuation of the hip roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps leading to a single main door, and a fenced entry with stone pillars.
